creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 249893
patch against x11-wm for missing LICENSE

This is an effort not unlike the move from usr/man to usr/share/man.
Only this effort is to add all the missing LICENSE files
from ports in all categories. The attached patch covers
all the ports missing LICENSE in the x11-wm category.

The following ports are affected:
afterstep-stable
amiwm
bbpager
e16-docs
epplets
fvwm2
lxqt
Makefile
obconf
piewm
plasma6-kdecoration
plasma6-kwin
transset
wm2
wmname
wmx
yeahwm
